settings.title: Metro Manila delivery and pickup
settings.text: Offer free Metro Manila delivery for eligible orders above ₱50,000, same-day pickup where available, and delivery schedules based on stock location and order confirmation.

settings.title: Provincial shipping
settings.text: For provincial orders, confirm item size, declared value, courier availability, shipping insurance, and estimated delivery window before fulfillment.

settings.title: Shipping & Delivery
settings.intro: Clear delivery expectations for laptops, components, monitors, and accessories.
